reasoning: The ISO27001 control A.8.22 focuses on the segregation of networks, which in Kubernetes can be addressed through NetworkPolicies to control ingress and egress traffic, ensuring that only necessary communication paths are allowed. Additionally, ensuring that services are not exposed unnecessarily (e.g., avoiding NodePort) contributes to network segregation. Implementing default deny policies and ensuring isolation between namespaces are key strategies in Kubernetes to achieve network segregation.
title: Segregation of Networks
